## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Anis (Attention) and Marcel (fwd.digital) to explore potential collaboration on AI-powered content creation and SEO strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/igoAvcNPTa8xdNqsD_Uqz5iaPPMwtSaY?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital offers AI-driven content creation and SEO services, focusing on high-quality, human-reviewed outputs at scale](https://fathom.video/share/igoAvcNPTa8xdNqsD_Uqz5iaPPMwtSaY?tab=summary&timestamp=63.0)
  - [Their approach combines AI workflows, expert human editors, and strategic insights to produce content that outperforms typical AI-generated articles](https://fathom.video/share/igoAvcNPTa8xdNqsD_Uqz5iaPPMwtSaY?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Attention is interested in leveraging these services to boost their SEO and content marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/igoAvcNPTa8xdNqsD_Uqz5iaPPMwtSaY?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
  - [A follow-up meeting with Attention's head of growth is scheduled to discuss potential engagement](https://fathom.video/share/igoAvcNPTa8xdNqsD_Uqz5iaPPMwtSaY?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)

## Topics

### Attention's Business Overview

  - [Co-founded by Anis Bennaceur 3 years ago](https://fathom.video/share/igoAvcNPTa8xdNqsD_Uqz5iaPPMwtSaY?tab=summary&timestamp=63.0)
  - [Tagline: "Automate work out of your customer conversations"](https://fathom.video/share/igoAvcNPTa8xdNqsD_Uqz5iaPPMwtSaY?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [Positioned as "revenue orchestration" - next-gen after call recording tools like Gong](https://fathom.video/share/igoAvcNPTa8xdNqsD_Uqz5iaPPMwtSaY?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [Extracts insights from conversations, aggregates across deals, and automates workflows](https://fathom.video/share/igoAvcNPTa8xdNqsD_Uqz5iaPPMwtSaY?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### fwd.digital's AI-Powered Content Creation

  - [Uses AI workflows to scale programmatic SEO and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/igoAvcNPTa8xdNqsD_Uqz5iaPPMwtSaY?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Combines AI generation with human expert review and editing](https://fathom.video/share/igoAvcNPTa8xdNqsD_Uqz5iaPPMwtSaY?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Workflow includes research, outline generation, content creation, and adaptation to brand voice](https://fathom.video/share/igoAvcNPTa8xdNqsD_Uqz5iaPPMwtSaY?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Utilizes various data sources: Google Search API, Perplexity API, client-specific resources](https://fathom.video/share/igoAvcNPTa8xdNqsD_Uqz5iaPPMwtSaY?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Content Quality and SEO Performance

  - [Aims to produce content better than Perplexity AI answers](https://fathom.video/share/igoAvcNPTa8xdNqsD_Uqz5iaPPMwtSaY?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
  - [Example: Home Base article on "how to calculate annual income" ranking for 1500 keywords](https://fathom.video/share/igoAvcNPTa8xdNqsD_Uqz5iaPPMwtSaY?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
  - [Focuses on adding unique value and angles to avoid AI-generated content penalties](https://fathom.video/share/igoAvcNPTa8xdNqsD_Uqz5iaPPMwtSaY?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Sees 3.2x increase in brand searches for clients like DeepBram](https://fathom.video/share/igoAvcNPTa8xdNqsD_Uqz5iaPPMwtSaY?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)

### Backlinking Strategies

  - [Recommends focusing on content quality over aggressive link building](https://fathom.video/share/igoAvcNPTa8xdNqsD_Uqz5iaPPMwtSaY?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
  - [Suggests leveraging AI citations (e.g., Perplexity) as a source of organic backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/igoAvcNPTa8xdNqsD_Uqz5iaPPMwtSaY?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
  - [Proposes outreach campaigns for partnerships and link exchanges once content base is established](https://fathom.video/share/igoAvcNPTa8xdNqsD_Uqz5iaPPMwtSaY?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)

### Pricing and Engagement Model

  - [Transparent pricing available in their documentation](https://fathom.video/share/igoAvcNPTa8xdNqsD_Uqz5iaPPMwtSaY?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)
  - [Offers month-to-month contracts with a minimum initial commitment](https://fathom.video/share/igoAvcNPTa8xdNqsD_Uqz5iaPPMwtSaY?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)
  - [Aims for a client-friendly approach with open communication and flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/igoAvcNPTa8xdNqsD_Uqz5iaPPMwtSaY?tab=summary&timestamp=1980.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule follow-up meeting with Attention's head of growth (set for tomorrow at 2:30 PM PT / 5:30 PM ET)](https://fathom.video/share/igoAvcNPTa8xdNqsD_Uqz5iaPPMwtSaY?tab=summary&timestamp=1859.0)
  - [Marcel to add Anis to a Slack channel for further communication](https://fathom.video/share/igoAvcNPTa8xdNqsD_Uqz5iaPPMwtSaY?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)
  - [Marcel to send meeting replay and potentially a Statement of Work (SOW)](https://fathom.video/share/igoAvcNPTa8xdNqsD_Uqz5iaPPMwtSaY?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Discuss potential collaboration on Attention's recent acquisition of a .com domain for SEO benefits](https://fathom.video/share/igoAvcNPTa8xdNqsD_Uqz5iaPPMwtSaY?tab=summary&timestamp=1687.0)
